news.headline: Global Kratom Extract Market projected to grow at 7.8% CAGR, reaching $268.9 million by 2030 from $143.6 million in 2023.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of February 13, 2025, the Kratom Extract Market is categorized based on type (liquid, powder, capsules, gummies) and application (offline, online). The global market size for Kratom Extract is projected to increase from 143.6 million USD in 2023 to approximately 268.9 million USD by 2030.

news.headline: Performant Healthcare achieves CMMI Maturity Level 3, showing commitment to excellence with 3 ISACA appraisals.
news.summary: Performant Healthcare, Inc. (Nasdaq: PHLT) based in Plantation, Florida, a key player in technology-driven payment integrity and eligibility services, disclosed its Level 3 re-appraisal in ISACA’s Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)®. This reaffirmation underscores the company's commitment to providing reliable, top-notch solutions and fostering continuous operational improvement.

news.headline: Trump: War in Ukraine has to end.
Trump: Ukraine would have seat at table in any peace negotiating, along with Russia.
Bancroft Fund Ltd. declares $0.32 per share cash distribution on March 24, 2025 to shareholders of record on March 17, 2025.
news.summary: In Rye, New York on February 13, 2025, the Board of Trustees of Bancroft Fund Ltd. announced a cash distribution of $0.32 per share for common shareholders of record on March 17, 2025. The payment is scheduled for March 24, 2025, and the fund is listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol BCV.

news.headline: Trump: Expects a lot of countries' tariffs to stay the same. I don't expect any exemptions or waivers.
Trump: Canada paying lowest for NATO.
Phoenix Children's, a major pediatric healthcare system, reveals retirement of President & CEO, Robert L. Meyer, after 22 years.
news.summary: The President and CEO of Phoenix Children's healthcare system for the past 22 years, Robert L. Meyer, has announced his retirement. Phoenix Children's is a leading pediatric healthcare system in the nation, known for its rapid growth. The retirement news was shared on February 13, 2025.

news.headline: MountainWest Capital Network names Spencer Eccles 2025 Entrepreneur of the Year. Eccles is former CEO of First Security Corp, current Chairman of Eccles Foundation.
news.summary: A prominent individual, Spencer F. Eccles, who previously served as Chairman and CEO of First Security Corp and who currently holds the position of Chairman and CEO of the George S. and Dolores Doré Eccles Foundation, has been chosen by MountainWest Capital Network (MWCN) to be honored at its 37th annual event. This recognition was announced in Salt Lake City on February 13, 2025. Eccles’ achievements in the business sector and philanthropy have earned him this prestigious accolade.

news.headline: Eagle Financial Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: EFSI) sold an additional 234,375 shares of common stock.
news.summary: In Berryville, Virginia on February 13, 2025, Eagle Financial Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: EFSI), the parent company of Bank of Clarke, reported that the underwriters of its recent public offering have exercised their overallotment option, concluding the sale. No specific numbers were provided regarding the additional shares sold through this option.

news.headline: Trump: The EU doesn’t treat the US right on trade.
Trump tariffs cause price hikes at FireflySci, a cuvette manufacturer in NY. Customers facing challenges due to tariffs.
news.summary: In Long Island, New York, on February 13, 2025, FireflySci, a prominent company specializing in cuvettes, calibration standards, and quartz glass optics, is tackling the obstacles presented by tariffs implemented by the Trump administration. These tariffs, designed to impact various industries, have posed significant challenges for the company. FireflySci, known worldwide for its innovative products, is strategizing to navigate through these imposed tariffs.

news.headline: Trump: Canada doesn't have enough military protection.

NAESCO to host 2025 Federal Market Workshop on March 13, 2025, in Washington, D.C. Includes federal government officials, ESCOs, and suppliers to discuss energy and building projects in the federal market.
news.summary: In Washington, the National Association of Energy Service Companies (NAESCO) will be hosting the 2025 Federal Market Workshop on March 13, 2025, at the National Housing Center in Washington, D.C. This event will gather federal government officials, Energy Service Companies (ESCOs), and suppliers to analyze energy and building infrastructure projects in the federal market. The workshop will bring together officials responsible for policy development and execution.

news.headline: Trump: Canada has been tough on military and not paying enough.
Teton Ridge names Ande Wall as Senior VP of Programming and Content. Over 2 decades experience in sports production.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, Teton Ridge, a prominent player in Western sports and entertainment, revealed the selection of Ande Wall as the new Senior Vice President of Programming and Content. Utilizing over 20 years of experience in sports production, storytelling, and talent nurturing, Ande will steer Teton Ridge’s sports programming and content direction. This will also involve managing the recently attained platform, The Cowboy Channel. Ande comes aboard Teton Ridge after a successful tenure at ESPN, bringing a wealth of industry knowledge to the role.

news.headline: Hill's Pet Nutrition and Association for Pet Obesity Prevention join forces to fight pet obesity, with almost 2/3 pets affected.
news.summary: In Overland Park, Kansas on February 13, 2025, a study found that approximately 66% of dogs and cats in the United States are overweight or obese. This poses a significant risk to their health, as it can lead to conditions such as diabetes, heart disease, and joint problems. In response to this alarming statistic, strategies based on data analysis are being developed to promote healthier lifestyles for pets, aiming to improve their well-being and happiness.

news.headline: Taco Cabana brings back iconic Margarita featuring Big Red to celebrate National Margarita Day on February 22.
news.summary: Celebrate National Margarita Day on February 22nd with Taco Cabana's famous Margarita, which includes Big Red. Known as TC's iconic Margarita, this drink is making a comeback in time for the occasion. Taco Cabana is thrilled to reintroduce this fan-favorite Margarita featuring Big Red to mark National Margarita Day.

news.headline: Dow climbs over 100 points; Deere surpasses earnings expectations. Indices: Dow up 0.33% at 44,514.10, NASDAQ up 0.83% at 19,812.30, S&P 500 rises by 0.52% to 6,083.72. Deere's Q1 net sales and revenue at $8.51 billion, beating consensus of $7.70 billion. Materials shares rose by 1.1%, while industrials fell by 0.2%.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. saw an increase in trading towards the end of the session, with the Dow Jones index soaring over 100 points on Thursday. The Dow rose by 0.33% to 44,514.10, the NASDAQ gained 0.83% to 19,812.30, and the S&P 500 climbed 0.52% to 6,083.72. Materials shares surged by 1.1% while industrials shares dipped by 0.2% on the same day. Deere & Co (NYSE:DE) reported earnings for its first quarter, with a 30% year-over-year decline in net sales to $8.51 billion, surpassing the expected $7.70 billion. The net sales for the quarter were $6.809 billion, compared to $10.486 billion in 2024. Deere's EPS stood at $3.19, a decrease from $6.23 in the previous year.

news.headline: IDEXX Labs (NASDAQ: IDXX) to attend two conferences. Mike Erickson and Andrew Emerson will speak on Feb 27.
news.summary: IDEXX Laboratories, Inc., a prominent player in pet healthcare, has announced its involvement in two upcoming conferences. On Thursday, February 27, from 9:05 am to 9:45 am EST, the event at the virtual BofA Securities Animal Health Summit will feature Mike Erickson, PhD, Executive Vice President, and General Manager of Point of Care Diagnostics and Telemedicine, along with Andrew Emerson, Senior Vice President of Corporate and CAG Finance, engaging in a fireside chat. This significant participation demonstrates their commitment to innovation and industry leadership.

news.headline: NVIDIA's Jensen Huang recognized for advancing Precision Medicine with AI at conference. CEO lauded for contributions.
news.summary: NVIDIA's CEO, Jensen Huang, was honored at the Precision Medicine World Conference for his remarkable contributions to artificial intelligence and accelerated computing in healthcare. The recognition highlights his significant impact on this sector, leveraging cutting-edge technologies for advancements in precision medicine. This acknowledgment underscores Huang's pivotal role in driving the integration of AI and accelerated computing in healthcare, revolutionizing the industry.

news.headline: 5th Annual Global Cyber Innovation Summit, aka "Davos of Cybersecurity," gathers top cybersecurity leaders, Global 2000 CISOs, innovative tech experts.
news.summary: Baltimore was the host city for the fifth consecutive Global Cyber Innovation Summit (GCIS), a renowned gathering often referred to as the “Davos of Cybersecurity.” The event brought together Global 2000 CISOs, cyber tech innovators, policy experts, and cyber investment leaders. Attendees included an elite group of individuals actively engaged in shaping cybersecurity strategies and solutions. The summit served as a key platform for impactful discussions and collaborations aimed at driving forward-thinking initiatives in the industry.

news.headline: MatterFi integrates AI wallet into Trrue blockchain, enhancing security for digital assets. Supports Trrue token issuance on Ethereum, expanding to Trrue Chain. Collaboration aims for streamlined management of assets.
news.summary: Fintech security provider MatterFi recently integrated its AI-powered wallet infrastructure into Trrue's blockchain ecosystem in an effort to enhance security and usability for digital asset transactions. By combining MatterFi's decentralized custody solutions with Trrue's Layer-1 blockchain technology, retail and institutional investors now have a more efficient and private method for managing digital assets. Initially, the integration will support Trrue's token issuance on Ethereum, with plans to expand to Trrue Chain upon its mainnet launch. MatterFi's wallet infrastructure, supported by Brinks Global, will provide advanced cryptographic security measures for users. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ADT to release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on Feb. 27, 2025 before market opens.
news.summary: ADT is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on Thursday, February 27, 2025, prior to the market opening. Investors and analysts eagerly await to review the company's latest numbers and strategic updates. This disclosure will provide key insights into ADT's revenue, profits, and overall financial health for the mentioned periods. This announcement could impact ADT's stock price and market perception, making it a significant event for stakeholders.

news.headline: Lutnick: Trump could start reciprocal plan by April 2.
Trump: The EU has 20% VAT also have other measures that hurt US companies including Apple.
Trump plans to introduce reciprocal tariffs in the near future, aiming to balance trade deficits.
Lutnick: Studies all complete by April 1.
Trump: Tariffs on autos coming soon, and stacked over reciprocal.
Trump: Interest rates are going to be going down.
ResearchAndMarkets.com has launched the "European Ferro-Alloy Producers and Traders Directory 2025", providing essential industry insights.
news.summary: Dublin – The "European Ferro-Alloy Directory 2025" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, providing valuable insights for stakeholders in the Ferro-Alloy sector. This directory serves as a crucial resource for anyone involved in the Ferro-Alloy supply chain, offering information on suppliers, traders, and industry dynamics. With the industry undergoing significant transformations due to factors like new business ventures, mergers, acquisitions, and technological innovations, staying informed is more important than ever. The directory is a comprehensive tool designed to navigate through these changes and stay ahead in the market.

news.headline: Trump: I expect jobs to go up, prices could go up somewhat short term.
Trump plans to impose new tariffs based on other countries' trade policies in a bid for fairness.
news.summary: The president announced that advisors will create revised tariff rates based on the trade policies of other countries that impact trade with the United States, such as tariffs, taxes, and subsidies.

news.headline: Trump: India has more tariffs than nearly any other country.
US Official: Trump is happy to lower tariffs if countries want to.
Trump, asked if consumers can expect higher prices: Not necessarily.
US Official: Tariffs to address subsidies and currency manipulation.
US Official: We don't rule out one-size-fits-all flat tariff.
1M+ coolers recalled in North America due to fingertip amputation/crushing risks. 12 injuries reported. Consumers urged to stop use and contact company.
news.summary: A recall of over 1 million coolers in the North American region has been initiated due to a reported dozen injuries. Consumers are being cautioned to discontinue the use of these coolers and are urged to get in touch with the company for further assistance.

news.headline: Trump focus on non-monetary and non-tariff barriers.
Trump: Chips and pharma will also be over and above.
Ellsworth Growth & Income Fund Ltd. declared $0.13 per share distribution to common shareholders, payable on March 24, 2025.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Rye, New York, Ellsworth Growth and Income Fund Ltd. (NYSE American: ECF) announced a cash distribution of $0.13 per share. This distribution is scheduled to be paid out on March 24, 2025, to common shareholders who are recorded as such on March 17, 2025.

news.headline: Trump: Steel and aluminum is over and above this.
Trump: Car tariffs will be over and above reciprocal tariffs, and coming shortly.
Trump: This will be over and above steel tariffs also cars and pharmaceuticals
Deere reports strong earnings, but weak outlook due to Trump tariffs impact; stock falls. Trump policies hit segments significantly.
news.summary: Deere reported earnings that surpassed expectations, but the company's segment outlook does not include the impact of Trump tariffs and retaliatory measures. The company anticipates a significant decrease in profits due to these tariffs. Consequently, Deere's stock declined following this announcement.

news.headline: Airbnb stock drops ahead of Q4 earnings report. Investors eager to view financial results.
news.summary: Ahead of the release of its fourth quarter earnings, Airbnb's stock experienced a decline on Thursday. Investors are eagerly anticipating the company's financial results. The exact figures that market participants are closely monitoring include revenue, profit, and any updates on key performance metrics. It is crucial to keep an eye on these numbers as they will provide important insights into Airbnb's financial health and overall performance.

news.headline: US Trade Rep. Greer: We’re going to look everything including fake antitrust regimes.
Senate voted to put RFK Jr. in charge of health, uncertain impact on biotech stocks.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Senate made the decision to appoint RFK Jr. to oversee health matters, raising speculation about his potential influence on biotech stock prices. This move has stirred interest in how he may shape the health sector.

news.headline: AppLovin stock soars after beating Q4 expectations. Investors ponder whether to hold APP stock post significant gain.
news.summary: Following its impressive Q4 report, AppLovin's stock saw a significant surge. The company's stock soared after beating expectations. With this substantial gain, investors may be wondering whether to hold onto their APP stock. Should they stick with it after the impressive performance in Q4?
